propositions: Every chain member must carry a fresh Verified +1 on its own post-rebase patchset SHA before submit; submit is blocked if any member lacks one.
Await for fresh Verified is bounded by a configurable timeout (default 30 min); on timeout the stack is handed back rather than blocking forever.
Ancestor-atomic submit is a single POST to the chain tip's submit endpoint, relying on Gerrit Submitted-Together and shared topic with submitWholeTopic for all-or-nothing landing.
After submit, the loop must verify every stack member reached MERGED; any member left open triggers a loud error and hand-back to uphold partial-land safety.
On full-merge success, associated tickets are closed/annotated via import rebar ticket ops.
